title: Where do I download german subs script for NGE D and R EOE
display_title: Where do I download german subs script for NGE D and R EOE
wikitext:
[]: Where do I download german subs/script for NGE/D&R/EOE?             Quote Post by mihail-kun » Mon Nov 15, 2010 11:06 am Want Asuka in my fanfic to speak more german, but I really don't speak it, so I think it's better to Ctrl+C Ctrl+V some phrases from german subs than use google translator. But the problem is I can't find german subs anywhere...

[]:             Quote Post by Hyper Shinchan » Mon Nov 15, 2010 11:30 am Yay, another Russian member, just a pair of days ago I was wondering if there were members from Russia; anyway here you go, German subtitles from Zhentarim DivX's release (is it safe to consider it "fair-use"? Actually I'm not even sure if they come from a DVD release or they're fansubs): [url]http://www.mediafire.com/?cwc0m174nj74qjh[/url]

[]:             Quote Post by InstrumentalityOne » Mon Nov 15, 2010 2:30 pm Hallo, Genosse Michail! The ZX(fansubbing group) releases of NGE have german subtitles or you could look for their ASS subtitle files on the internet.

[]:             Quote Post by mihail-kun » Mon Nov 15, 2010 9:09 pm Hyper Shinchan, thank you. P.S. Good signature :-) I hope it'l keep being alright in remaining two movies. InstrumentalityOne, Don't you think that if I said "I can't find german subs anywhere" it means I already looked for them on the internet?

[]:             Quote Post by Hyper Shinchan » Mon Nov 15, 2010 11:58 pm mihail-kun wrote: Hyper Shinchan, thank you.
